productName: Canna Organix Nectar Terp Sauce Jokerz - 1g
description: Glistening hybrid terp sauce from Jokerz, separating crystalline cannabinoids from a terpene-rich nectar for a dab that's all about taste. Saucy, aromatic, full-spectrum, with notes of tar, cheese, and chemical, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
